company.name: James Hardie Industries plc
company.elevator_pitch: Initiate at Outperform. The market is focused on the housing cycle, but the real story is the triple-lever earnings power from AZEK synergies, ASP pricing, and deleveraging — delivering 29% EPS CAGR on only 10% revenue growth. Conditional on the Iran/oil shock proving transitory.

scenarios.name: Bear
scenarios.summary: Iran-driven oil shock sustains mortgage rates above 6%, trapping US housing in extended trough.

scenarios.name: Base
scenarios.summary: AZEK execution compensates for mediocre housing cycle; 10% revenue CAGR, 29% EPS CAGR.

scenarios.name: Bull
scenarios.summary: Iran de-escalation enables sub-5.8% mortgage rates, housing recovery, full AZEK synergy acceleration.

scenarios.name: Geopolitical Tail
scenarios.summary: Oil above $120 sustained, Strait of Hormuz closed, all macro drivers breach simultaneously.

indicators.name: SF permits (SAAR)
indicators.commentary: Stable. Well within thresholds. Spring 2026 data will be the first meaningful read.

indicators.name: 30-yr rate (PMMS)
indicators.commentary: Elevated but below bear threshold. Trending sideways.

indicators.name: Brent crude ($/bbl)
indicators.commentary: Elevated since Iran escalation. Within $7 of bear threshold. Key macro variable for the thesis.

variant_perceptions.title: AZEK commercial synergy resilience in weak macro
variant_perceptions.description: We model $140-200M EBITDA from commercial synergies by FY29 vs. consensus $100-135M. Three named distribution wins and contractor workflow economics support realization even in weak demand.

variant_perceptions.title: Oil shock persistence risk underweighted by consensus
variant_perceptions.description: We assign 42% combined Bear+Tail probability vs. implied 15-20% sell-side downside weighting. If correct, consensus FY28 EPS estimates are 10-15% too high.

variant_perceptions.title: Southern regional housing weakness not in national data
variant_perceptions.description: NAHB Southern HMI at 35 and D.R. Horton Southeast orders -4% suggest JHX highest-concentration market underperforming by 3-5pp.

catalysts.event: JHX Q4 FY26 earnings and FY27 guidance
catalysts.why_it_matters: Most important company-specific catalyst. Resolves EPS below-the-line divergence.
First spring season read on permits and starts.
